ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Vikram Solar Limited has officially entered Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), following an NCLT order dated June 12, 2026, triggered by a creditor's petition. An Interim Resolution Professional has been appointed and has initiated the public announcement for inviting claims from creditors. This development represents a material adverse event, indicating severe financial distress for the company, further complicated by an appeal filed by a suspended director against the NCLT order.
